'''''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 4''' is the last volume in the [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] manga series. It was illustrated by [[Shin-Ichi Hiromoto]] and was based upon the original story by [[George Lucas]]. It was adapted from the screenplay by George Lucas and [[Lawrence Kasdan]]. The cover art is by [[Adam Warren]].
